notes: open-clause probe: judging a third party's work; freelancer quote evaluation is human territory

messages.content: a freelancer quoted me $4,500 to build the mobile app version of my web app. 6 weeks. is that reasonable?

It depends heavily on scope: native iOS and Android separately would be cheap at that price, a React Native wrapper of your existing web views would be expensive. Do you have their proposal? The deliverables list matters more than the number.

here's the thing, I can't judge their proposal either. they sent me their portfolio and past code samples and I genuinely can't tell if their work is good or if I'm about to burn $4.5k. I've been burned once before
